_schema: Dark Factory spec/ticket registry — the future-ticket store. Modeled on Symphony (docs/watchtower/symphony-spec.md §4.1 entities + §7.1 states).
_priority: integer, LOWER = higher priority (Symphony convention; 1..4 preferred, null sorts last)
_note: Spec-written = requirement captured for FUTURE ticketing (David's 'happy' bar). Building is a separate, later decision. At build time, Symphony §7.1 run-states (Unclaimed/Claimed/Running/...) take over. Eventual home = a real Symphony work-management layer; this JSON is the interim tracker.
